question: Regarding the steps taken to increase the production of semiconductors in India.
answer: The Ministry of Electronics and IT has launched the Semicon India program with an outlay of ₹76,000 crore to provide financial support to companies investing in semiconductors.
importance: MPs use starred questions to hold ministries accountable and get oral answers on the floor of the House.

title: Standing Committee on External Affairs - 24th Report
text: Report on India's 'Neighborhood First' policy, focusing on trade and security cooperation with BIMSTEC nations.
importance: Committee reports provide deep technical analysis of policies and help politicians understand legislative nuances.

voting: Voice Vote in Lok Sabha, Passed with amendments in Rajya Sabha.
importance: Crucial for tracking party positions and legislative history of major laws.
